programme.title: E125
programme.desc: Shivprasad and Shalini, an ordinary married couple, embrace love, laughter, and everyday joys, weaving a simple yet fulfilling life that celebrates togetherness and quiet contentment.

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: Dr. Noyonika's quiet life with her daughter, Ujjayani, takes a chaotic turn when she meets young pop star Ishaan. Now, she must choose between societal judgment and a rare second chance.

programme.title: E51
programme.desc: Aparajita, a talented artist haunted by her past, crosses paths with Rakshit, a reserved businessman. Though he avoids romance, their unexpected connection might just lead to true love.

programme.title: E5188
programme.desc: Dr. Abhimanyu, a misogynist, falls for Akshara, their daughter. Complications arise when Akshara's half-sister, Arohi, also falls for him.

programme.title: E316 - 2
programme.desc: Time flew by, yet Tulsi Virani stood strong as the Sarvagunn matriarch! Can she navigate the challenges of modern-day parenting and relationships?

programme.desc: Yosemite Sam can tame a lion, but he can't tame Bugs. Porky can't believe he agreed to participate in a boxing match.

programme.title: E52 - Jail Break/Full Disclosure/Joy Ride
programme.desc: Steven teams up with a new ally to rescue the Gems.

programme.title: E432 - Lamput Docs And Robot/The Docs Express/Clowning Around
programme.desc: Lamput is stuck in the lab with a dangerous robot on the loose! It’s up to the combined effort of the two Docs and the entire Lab team to save him before it is too late.

programme.title: E113 - The Wild Life
programme.desc: Giant chunks of land disappear and the Spies go undercover as camp counsellors to stop it. But juggling kids and nature is harder than it looks and soon the Spies must track a missing camper as well as the villain while fending off giant vegetables.

programme.title: E154 - Blunder Arrest/ Telephone Pole Gag: Airplane Stairs/ Cymbal Minded/Hook Line And Sti
programme.desc: Elmer Fudd tries to arrest Bugs Bunny. Sylvester tries to eat Tweety. Daffy makes sweet, sweet music.

programme.title: E271 - Ketchup/Fionna And Cake And Fionna/Whispers/Three Buckets/Orb
programme.desc: BMO and Marceline swap stories about their recent adventures.

programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo hide under the house and spy on two mysterious tradies working in the backyard, wondering what they're up to.

programme.desc: When Grandmaster Glitch takes the quadriga from the Brandenburg Gate, the Go Jetters must stop him before he reaches Grim HQ.

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: This time, Jamie's dressing a salad in a way you've never seen before... with a crown of cheese! He's got a speedy, tasty twist on your Sunday roast that keeps it all in one pan; and puts store-cupboard essentials centre stage in two fabulous family meals that are made in minutes. Finally, YouTube sensation Alex Ainouz shares his fabulous 5-ingredient take on a French classic.

programme.desc: Jack Black, Paul Rudd, Jessie Buckley and Michelle de Swarte join Graham on his sofa. With music from Tom Odell.

programme.title: E110 - Rex Dies
programme.desc: As the kids prepare for a big play, Rex is accidentally sucked into a giant fan and Tori is responsible. Robbie is an emotional wreck and it's up to Tori to save the day by saving Rex's life.

programme.title: E282 - Arbor Day Disarray / Ain't That the Tooth
programme.desc: Sandy gives her friends special saltwater trees, but they need more attention than she expected. // SpongeBob and Patrick mistake a burglar for the tooth fairy.

programme.title: E507 - Cow Pie Kid / Saved by the Spell
programme.desc: Lynn pushes Liam to his limits when he becomes the star pitcher for the middle school baseball team. // Lincoln's friends try to stop him from performing a magic act at the middle school talent show.

programme.title: E309 - All Out of Idea Bricks / A Fool Schooled
programme.desc: Patrick and Squidina follow a runaway idea brick into Randomland. // After discovering that Patrick never finished behavioral training, the family home-schools him.

programme.title: E106 - The Heat is on
programme.desc: It's the Chahuta's Chili eating contest, and soon it's revealed Marcel's a cheat.

programme.title: E305 - Mouth Candy
programme.desc: Jasper’s enthusiasm in crime fighting leads him to send Captain Man and Kid Danger into incidents that are not crimes. So when he is falsely accused of a burglary and sent to jail, Henry and Ray must find a way to set him free.

programme.title: E208 - Bottle Snatchers
programme.desc: After Danger Force thwarts a robbery at Club Soda and has a legendary night celebrating their win, Ray challenges the kids to repeat their epic night out without their superhero uniforms and powers.

programme.title: E103 - Raph Thinks It Through
programme.desc: Raph's strength won't save him when he's caught between the Mechazoids and the notorious street gang known as Purple Dragons! Raph's going to have to use his head to get out of this one!

programme.title: E184 - Jailbreak! / Evil Spatula
programme.desc: An imprisoned Plankton teams up with his fellow inmates to break out of jail and steal the Krabby Patty secret formula. // SpongeBob replaces his broken spatula with one from Plankton, which may or may not have magical powers.

programme.title: E711 - Leave No Van Behind / Sponsor Tripped
programme.desc: Vanzilla breaks down. // Lynn and friends enjoy free perks around Royal Wood.

programme.title: E714 - What Lies Beneath
programme.desc: When Dante buries a secret in The Royal Woods Cemetery, he must stop the Morticians Club from discovering what it is.

programme.title: E280 - Abandon Twits
programme.desc: The Krusty Krew builds a boat for their penny-pinching captain.

programme.title: E407 - Present Tense / Any Given Sundae
programme.desc: Convinced that their scrapbook isn't good enough for Dad's birthday, the Loud kids seek out the perfect gift. // Lily hears the parents mention ice cream if the kids are good, so she uses baby smarts to avert sibling disasters

E10 - Over Cooked Beans
programme.desc: On the hottest day of the year, an air conditioner falls from the sky and brings out the worst in the campers at Camp Kidney.

programme.title: E11 - The Battle Of Pimpleback Mountain
programme.desc: The Jellies rip a hole in Lumpus' prized tent and will do anything to keep Lumpus from discovering the secret.

programme.title: E1 - The Frog Principal
programme.desc: Pixiefrog's irrational fear of being kissed turns out to be not so irrational after all.

E22 - Jean Lurcat/Alix Waline/Jacquemus/Alain Ellouz
programme.desc: In Angers, in a 12th-century building, discover tapestries by Jean Lurcat alongside ancient textile works. The world of designer Alix Waline unfolds on both a small and large scale. At the Chateau de Versailles, Jacquemus pays tribute to his family's farming roots. Alain Ellouz transcends light through stone.

programme.title: E10 - Transformation Of Former Offices Into A Home
programme.desc: Cedric and Virginie head to the Grand Duchy of Luxembourg to discover the radical renovation of office space into a cozy family home; the incredible Bubble House of artist Bernard Tirtiaux in Fleurus; sheep's wool insulation, natural and eco-friendly; installing a tiled backsplash.

programme.title: E20 - At The Heart Of The Matonge District
programme.desc: In the Matonge district, a discovery of the home of painter Isabelle Ravet and her daughters; the hotel ''Les Bains de Spa,'' the restoration of a landmark of Spa's heritage; wood as the ideal material for building modular homes; making a shoe rack.

programme.title: E113
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. programme.title: Why Gaudi's Sagrada Familia Will Blow Your Mind
programme.desc: Antoni Gaudi's Sagrada Familia in Barcelona is a living masterpiece - and probably the world's most famous construction site. 2026 marks 100 years since the death of the visionary who redefined architecture.

programme.title: Learning Lessons From Nature's Losses
programme.desc: Coal dust poses a health risk to people in India's mining regions. Local women are taking it on. The economic impact of extreme weather. And: Alpine olives!

programme.title: When Bears Roamed The Streets Of A Romanian Resort
programme.desc: A tourist hotspot turned into a danger zone as bears came daily. Now the town is a success story. Plus: How a German village got dirt cheap energy prices. And Ethiopia's stilt walkers balance tradition and modernity.

programme.title: E15
programme.desc: 一位正直的明星律師兼忠實粉絲，在偶像被指控謀殺後挺身而出，為他辯護。「孟世娜」是擁有豐富經歷的刑事辯護律師，同時是偶像團體Gold Boys的十年以上的忠實粉絲。在Gold Boys的主唱「都來益」因捲入殺人事件而成為嫌疑人時，她隱藏了自己的崇拜之情，為他辯護，並揭示了一個意想不到的真相。

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: 講述世界排名第一的拳擊選手李權淑在令全韓國為之瘋狂後突然引退並銷聲匿跡；某一天體育經理人的出現並提出了一個讓她無法拒絕的復出提議，而隨之發生的故事。

programme.title: E27
programme.desc: 當紅主播許妍（趙露思飾）和都會精英沈皓明（陳偉霆飾）是一對人人艷羨慕的夫妻，看似十分般配的兩人，由於出生環境的差異，始終難以融入對方的圈子。許妍靠著光鮮的主持人身分和「精心裝點」的身世順利和沈皓明步入婚姻，而這一切盡在沈皓明的掌握下。衝突來臨，許妍脫離沈皓明的掌控一去不回頭。沈皓明卻發現自己早已陷入愛情，想要全力追回許妍。經歷種種，兩人終於撕掉外表的偽裝，重新靠近，會見彼此的內在，也重新認識自己。

programme.title: E5 - Very Extreme Sports
programme.desc: The modern concept of 'extreme sports' is a product of marketing, but back in the old days, the rules of our nation's sports made them truly extreme. From bone-crushing football to deadly baseball games.

programme.title: E5 - The War At Sea
programme.desc: The story of how America's battle to control the seas against the terrifying German U-boats in the Atlantic and Japan's fearsome Navy in the Pacific ultimately turns the tide of the war.

programme.title: E5 - The War At Sea
programme.desc: The story of how America's battle to control the seas against the terrifying German U-boats in the Atlantic and Japan's fearsome Navy in the Pacific ultimately turns the tide of the war.

programme.title: E2 - Nova Scotia
programme.desc: At either edge of the province, Nova Scotia proves that any beach is built from raw forces in opposition, but also that balance between those forces is necessary if life is to thrive.

programme.title: E2 - Escape to the Deep
programme.desc: Count down the seconds as the sun sets and predators prowl around the pool before the tide finally rolls in. Persevere as night falls with a kleptomaniacal slug and an acrobatic scallop, while a pair of sneaky crabs take a dangerous shot at romance.

programme.title: E2 - Nova Scotia
programme.desc: At either edge of the province, Nova Scotia proves that any beach is built from raw forces in opposition, but also that balance between those forces is necessary if life is to thrive.

programme.title: E1 - Waterhole
programme.desc: Witness clashes over precious resources when the dry season brings a band of gladiators to an African savannah watering hole. See a lion-elephant territory brawl, an ant raid on a termite mound, and a honey badger’s risky dance with a deadly snake.

programme.title: E1 - Carnivores of the Coral Garden
programme.desc: The seas are alive with carnivores. Meet the sharks and rays who patrol the coral reefs, hunting down their prey. Learn about toxic fish who disguise themselves to ambush the unwary, and armoured predators who devour vulnerable targets.

programme.title: E2 - Magicians of the Reef
programme.desc: Arabia’s coral reefs are home to some of nature’s most impressive illusionists. Creatures can pulsate with colour, transform in the blink of an eye, or perform riveting displays of showmanship. Because in these dangerous waters, disguise is crucial.

programme.desc: Arabia’s coral reefs are home to some of nature’s most impressive illusionists. Creatures can pulsate with colour, transform in the blink of an eye, or perform riveting displays of showmanship. Because in these dangerous waters, disguise is crucial.

programme.title: E1 - Carnivores of the Coral Garden
programme.desc: The seas are alive with carnivores. Meet the sharks and rays who patrol the coral reefs, hunting down their prey. Learn about toxic fish who disguise themselves to ambush the unwary, and armoured predators who devour vulnerable targets.

programme.title: E2 - Magicians of the Reef
programme.desc: Arabia’s coral reefs are home to some of nature’s most impressive illusionists. Creatures can pulsate with colour, transform in the blink of an eye, or perform riveting displays of showmanship. Because in these dangerous waters, disguise is crucial.

programme.title: E2 - Wild Coast
programme.desc: Go up against Australia’s wiliest gladiators and their impressive arsenals. Learn if these weapons, such as the kangaroo’s deadly boxing moves and the redback spider’s precision-engineered traps, can help them survive the ravages of climate change.

programme.title: E2 - Connections
programme.desc: Follow scientists and Traditional Owners as they map out ecological links, migratory pathways, and interspecies bonds that conserve Ningaloo’s biodiversity. Frolic with whales, float among seaweed islands, and see archaeologists nix a settler myth.

programme.title: E3 - Choices
programme.desc: Learn how Ningaloo’s conservation miracle could inspire humans to pull the planet back from the brink of climatic destruction. Visit an abandoned whaling station and other ruins that show we have the tools, if only we can find the will to change.

programme.title: E2 - Otago Peninsula/ Muaupoko
programme.desc: Set sail for New Zealand’s Otago Peninsula, a breeding refuge for endangered seabirds and marine mammals. Watch as sea lions, albatrosses, red-billed gulls, white-fronted terns, and fairy prions find mates, then nurture the next generation.

programme.title: E1 - Carnivores of the Coral Garden
programme.desc: The seas are alive with carnivores. Meet the sharks and rays who patrol the coral reefs, hunting down their prey. Learn about toxic fish who disguise themselves to ambush the unwary, and armoured predators who devour vulnerable targets.

programme.title: E2 - Magicians of the Reef
programme.desc: Arabia’s coral reefs are home to some of nature’s most impressive illusionists. Creatures can pulsate with colour, transform in the blink of an eye, or perform riveting displays of showmanship. Because in these dangerous waters, disguise is crucial.

programme.title: E2 - Wild Coast

programme.title: E2 - Nova Scotia
programme.desc: At either edge of the province, Nova Scotia proves that any beach is built from raw forces in opposition, but also that balance between those forces is necessary if life is to thrive.

programme.title: E2 - Nova Scotia
programme.desc: At either edge of the province, Nova Scotia proves that any beach is built from raw forces in opposition, but also that balance between those forces is necessary if life is to thrive.

programme.title: E2 - Escape to the Deep
programme.desc: Count down the seconds as the sun sets and predators prowl around the pool before the tide finally rolls in. Persevere as night falls with a kleptomaniacal slug and an acrobatic scallop, while a pair of sneaky crabs take a dangerous shot at romance.

programme.title: E2 - Nova Scotia
programme.desc: At either edge of the province, Nova Scotia proves that any beach is built from raw forces in opposition, but also that balance between those forces is necessary if life is to thrive.

programme.title: E1 - Waterhole
programme.desc: Witness clashes over precious resources when the dry season brings a band of gladiators to an African savannah watering hole. See a lion-elephant territory brawl, an ant raid on a termite mound, and a honey badger’s risky dance with a deadly snake.

E17
programme.desc: 千金小姐林夏不幸被贅婿葉冬設局陷害，不僅失明、父親亦遭毒手。她在重見光明後，看穿了丈夫覬覦家產的邪惡真面目；為了奪回一切並揭開真相，林夏決定改頭換面，以全新身份潛入舊日世界，向渣男與同夥展開一步步毫不留情的復仇。

programme.title: E6 - 畫風不同的兩個爸爸討論帶娃經驗
programme.desc: 由伊能靜擔任團長，董璇、喬杉、李嘉格、余宇涵、沈奕斐等擔任觀察員，以「爸爸圖鑑」為主題，通過展現不同家庭的相處模式，聚焦三位背景各異、育兒方式不同的父親，記錄他們真實的帶娃日常，展現多元的家庭教育模式與溫馨的成長故事。

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: 千金小姐林夏不幸被贅婿葉冬設局陷害，不僅失明、父親亦遭毒手。她在重見光明後，看穿了丈夫覬覦家產的邪惡真面目；為了奪回一切並揭開真相，林夏決定改頭換面，以全新身份潛入舊日世界，向渣男與同夥展開一步步毫不留情的復仇。

programme.title: E7 - 05後大學生已經出來求職了
programme.desc: 打破傳統求職單向選擇的邏輯，從企業「滅燈挑錯」的評判模式，升級為發掘求職者自身閃光點的賦能模式。企業面試官可以隨時爆燈拋出橄欖枝，同步明確崗位與薪酬待遇，大幅拓寬求職者的選擇空間，讓雙向匹配更高效、更真誠。

programme.desc: A chaotic, high-stakes family saga where a seemingly perfect man and an endearingly flawed woman collide while every generation fights to become the main character of their own life.

programme.title: E29
programme.desc: To Dan-dan, her family was an obstacle. She eventually leaves home and starts working as a resident tutor. And the more time she spends with the kids and their father, Young-guk, the more she falls for him.

programme.title: E46
programme.desc: A chaotic, high-stakes family saga where a seemingly perfect man and an endearingly flawed woman collide while every generation fights to become the main character of their own life.

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: Age is just a number-attraction is pure instinct. Charismatic “Noonas” (older women) who have long put love on hold to pursue their careers meet younger men who fearlessly follow their hearts, sparking emotionally driven romances. Breaking through the real-world barriers of age differences, this bold and candid reality series follows older-woman–younger-man couples as they explore love with honesty and courage. As their relationships unfold, long-dormant romantic instincts are awakened in this refreshingly daring dating reality show.

programme.title: E3 - A Big Ocean Clean Up Day!
programme.desc: Join the Shark Family as they work hard to keep the sea clean! It's a busy day with so much rubbish on the seabed. Stanley Shark becomes his heroic alter-ego, Super Shark, to show everyone how to clean up & recycle properly! The Sharksons show their creativity by using recycled materials to build an amazing underwater ball pit & slide. Plus, see them use teamwork to operate little digger trucks & even fix a broken bus wheel using a sunken bin lid!

programme.title: E3 - Songs About Feeling Good & Staying Safe!
programme.desc: Join Kii & Yii for songs about feeling good & staying safe! First, learn the best way to get a healthy smile in a fun & educational song about how to brush your teeth properly. Then, learn how to be safe when you're riding a bike at the playground. The lessons continue as Kii & Yii sing about being kind to each other, especially when a friend is sick. From learning colors to singing a soothing lullaby, these songs will make you feel good!

programme.title: E2 - The Ultimate Arpo vs Squirrel Showdown!
programme.desc: It's the ultimate showdown between Arpo & his arch-nemesis, the Squirrel! The trouble multiplies when the squirrel uses a ray gun to create an army of clones that fills the house. Then, the battle for food continues as the squirrel tries to steal a freshly baked apple pie & tasty food from a picnic BBQ. The showdown gets truly bizarre when the squirrel gets trapped inside Arpo & takes control of the robot's body, causing all sorts of confusing chaos for the family!

programme.title: E2 - Sweet Dreams & Goodnight Songs!
programme.desc: Get ready for sweet dreams & goodnight songs! First, Mia giggles with delight as she gathers four of her favorite stuffed animals into bed with her for a fun game of 'Ten in the Bed.' The bedtime fun continues as Maple & Muffin play a game of 'Five Little Monkeys' during their bubble bath. Then, Grandma Panda helps Mia & Bari embark on a fantastic adventure, building a little rocket out of cushions to go on an adventure to the moon!

programme.title: E6 - Kids vs Parents: Football Showdown
programme.desc: Join JJ and friends for an ultimate sports day! Challenge the parents to a huge soccer match, play basketball against animal pals, and work together in a friendly game of baseball. It's not about winning, but doing your best and having fun!

programme.title: E4 - A Guide To Fun & Healthy Days!
programme.desc: Blippi is your guide to having fun & healthy days! First, have some fun in the sun while learning from Señor Super Sunscreen how to apply sunscreen properly. Then, shrink down with Blippi & Meekah as they travel to Italy to learn how to make an authentic pizza! The adventure continues as Blippi helps a bear get ready for winter hibernation. After a long day of fun, it's time for bed, as a magical book reads a bedtime story about the benefits of a good night's rest!

programme.title: E3 - How Does JJ Like to Play?
programme.desc: Find out all the fun ways JJ likes to play! First, join JJ, TomTom & YoYo as they spend the day indoors pretending to be doctors & nurses. Then, the fun continues outside! When the kids get restless at a family barbecue, they play a fun game of 'Simon Says.' On another adventure, experienced scouts TomTom & YoYo take JJ under their wing & show him how to do classic outdoor camping activities. From racing grocery carts to a doggy playdate, JJ loves to play!

programme.title: E3 - Magic Pets Football Fun!
programme.desc: Join Morphle, Mila, and Jordie as they face off against the Magic Pets in a wild soccer match! With Incra and Telepup using their powers, Team Morphle will have to get creative to win the trophy. It’s a magical, winner-take-all game!

programme.title: E2 - Construction Chaos & Clever Fixes
programme.desc: Get ready for some construction chaos & clever fixes! First, Mr. Rubble is very tired & puts the plans on the board upside down, causing the crew to build a house upside down! Then, while building a roundabout, the crew finds some big old dinosaur bones! The chaos continues as a power cut stops all their machines, so they hook everything up to clean solar panels instead. From building a pond for frogs to building themselves into a box, it's always chaotic!

programme.title: E2 - Gecko vs Weasel: Ultimate Rivalry
programme.desc: The ultimate rivalry between Gecko & Mr. Weasel heats up! After a big rainstorm, Weasel challenges Gecko to a head-to-head car wash competition. Then, Weasel decides he wants a Mechanical of his own, so he hatches a scheme to try & steal Gecko's secret plans! The rivalry continues as Weasel tries to show off his new sports car but gets stuck, & his automated car wash mistakes Weasel for his car!

programme.title: E2 - A Big Day of Games & Fun!
programme.desc: Get ready for a big day of discovery & play with Twinkle & her friends! The fun starts as they learn to play new musical instruments, with Twinkle on drums, Kitty on the sax & Bunny on guitar! Then, it's time to play a fun game of 'Twinkle Says'! Follow along as they give you playful instructions & see if you can keep up. The discoveries continue as the friends find a mirror & make funny faces & wonder what an umbrella is for before it starts to rain!

programme.title: E6 - Kids vs Parents: Football Showdown
programme.desc: Join JJ and friends for an ultimate sports day! Challenge the parents to a huge soccer match, play basketball against animal pals, and work together in a friendly game of baseball. It's not about winning, but doing your best and having fun!

programme.desc: It's the ultimate showdown between Arpo & his arch-nemesis, the Squirrel! The trouble multiplies when the squirrel uses a ray gun to create an army of clones that fills the house. Then, the battle for food continues as the squirrel tries to steal a freshly baked apple pie & tasty food from a picnic BBQ. The showdown gets truly bizarre when the squirrel gets trapped inside Arpo & takes control of the robot's body, causing all sorts of confusing chaos for the family!

programme.title: E3 - A Big Ocean Clean Up Day!
programme.desc: Join the Shark Family as they work hard to keep the sea clean! It's a busy day with so much rubbish on the seabed. Stanley Shark becomes his heroic alter-ego, Super Shark, to show everyone how to clean up & recycle properly! The Sharksons show their creativity by using recycled materials to build an amazing underwater ball pit & slide. Plus, see them use teamwork to operate little digger trucks & even fix a broken bus wheel using a sunken bin lid!

programme.title: E6 - Kids vs Parents: Football Showdown
programme.desc: Join JJ and friends for an ultimate sports day! Challenge the parents to a huge soccer match, play basketball against animal pals, and work together in a friendly game of baseball. It's not about winning, but doing your best and having fun!

programme.desc: Vidhi, a young woman, falls in love with Devratha, a middle-aged tycoon. Together they embark on a journey of love, and acceptance beyond the barrier of age.

programme.title: Shaurya Aur Anokhi Ki Kahani
programme.desc: Shaurya, a male chauvinist who believes that every girl's future belongs in the kitchen, is in for a surprise when he crosses paths with Anokhi, a hardworking girl.

programme.title: 2 Good 2 Be True[Live]
programme.desc: Ali, a hardworking nurse with big dreams, crosses paths with Eloy, a clever mechanic secretly living a double life as a con artist and law student. Their rocky first meeting leads to an unexpected partnership involving a wealthy old man, hidden identities, family secrets, and emotional healing. As love grows amid deception, the series explores trust, redemption, and second chances, blending romance, comedy, and drama.

programme.title: The Alibi[Live]
programme.desc: Vincent, an heir to a news empire, gets accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real as their shared wounds and ambitions draw them together. But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.

programme.title: The Alibi[Live]

But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.

programme.title: The Iron Heart
programme.desc: The Iron Heart follows Apollo Adelantar, an undercover operative with a traumatic past who is assigned to infiltrate a powerful crime syndicate. As he goes deeper into his dangerous mission, Apollo is forced to confront painful truths about his identity, loyalty, and family-especially when trusted allies turn into enemies. Fueled by vengeance, justice, and his desire to protect the innocent, Apollo and his companions face relentless trials that test not only their strength but also their moral convictions.

programme.title: The Lunatics
programme.desc: Social worker Fun specializes in counseling psychotics. Writer Yip is inspired by his mission and decides to work with him. One day, Fung is accidentally killed by a patient...

programme.title: The Movie Star Says -Michael Wong
programme.desc: Michael Wong rose to prominence on the big screen in the 80s with his “half Chinese, half foreign' identity and eye-catching appearance, from the early rebellious and unruly big boy to the tough and strong policeman role later. Looking back the bygone days, he barely knew Cantonese but was fortunate to meet a like-minded partner who helped him through the break-in period, and which film from his decades-long career impressed him the most? After played countless roles, how does he feel about his identity as an actor?

programme.title: Midnight Fly
programme.desc: Michele takes off for Europe to contemplate her inevitable divorce. She meets the beautiful Miki, a Japanese model who tries to end a relationship with a married man. There is nothing like love trouble to foster a quick bond and the women become close friends. However, during an evening of drunken revelry, Miki discloses by accident that she is the other woman of Michele's husband...

programme.title: The United Archives E1999 -PL: Man City v United 93/94
E6 - Common Carp
programme.desc: Common carp are one of the most widely introduced species of fish in the world. However, most people in the U.S. won't eat them, referring to them as a 'trash fish.' Bowfisherman and fishing guide Curt Cich will tell you otherwise, as these fish are fun to bowhunt, have plenty of fresh meat and are delicious smoked. These fish are so plentiful, Curt runs a year-round full-time guiding service targeting only carp.

programme.title: E1 - Land Meets Bayou
programme.desc: Similar to any good Cajun dish, a successful duck camp requires preparation. The last day on dry land is filled with essential stops to get ready for 5 days on the Bayou. Whether making sure we have the right ingredients for our favorite meals, or getting the boats brushed up and ready for action, the day before can be just as important as the day of.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: Meet the mob of ‘street smart’ kangaroos moving into Australia’s capital city and the ecologists following their every move. Over one year we follow mob leader Black Spot and kangaroo mum Madge with her two young joeys – mischievous Sonny and tiny pouch bound Alice. After 15 years of drought, Canberra’s Eastern Grey Kangaroos know that the parks and gardens of Australia’s “bush capital” provide a reliable supply of the juicy grass but learning to be a street-smart urban ‘roo is tough with the kangaroos negotiating busy roads and avoiding cars and dogs. Inevitably their incursion into human habitat causes problems – damage to property and collisions with cars. It’s costing millions and thousands of animals are killed each year. The farmers complain that the ‘roos are eroding farmland and damaging their fences. The ACT Government holds an annual kangaroo cull to reduce animal numbers to “sustainable levels”. Confrontations make international news as the situation arouses passions and pol

programme.title: E8 - Victoria: Culinary Roadtrip
programme.desc: Sara heads to Victoria where she visits the farms and wineries, which she finds after travelling inland from the Great Ocean Road. She is planning to visit the restaurant Brae, which is run by an unknown chef.

programme.title: E9 - Sara’s Favourites
programme.desc: Sara lists her top 5 experiences and we see some new recipes ala Sara that she created inspired by Australia. From an eccentric pizza entrepreneur to a game of golf with kangaroos -these are Sara's favorites.

programme.desc: Sara lists her top 5 experiences and we see some new recipes ala Sara that she created inspired by Australia. From an eccentric pizza entrepreneur to a game of golf with kangaroos -these are Sara's favorites.

programme.title: E6 - Common Carp
programme.desc: Common carp are one of the most widely introduced species of fish in the world. However, most people in the U.S. won't eat them, referring to them as a 'trash fish.' Bowfisherman and fishing guide Curt Cich will tell you otherwise, as these fish are fun to bowhunt, have plenty of fresh meat and are delicious smoked. These fish are so plentiful, Curt runs a year-round full-time guiding service targeting only carp.

programme.title: E6 - Halibut, Lobster & Seaweed
programme.desc: On a very special episode, Daniel fishes halibut and lobster, and also forages seaweed for the most important dinner of his life - Avani and his wedding!

programme.title: E1 - Land Meets Bayou
programme.desc: Similar to any good Cajun dish, a successful duck camp requires preparation. The last day on dry land is filled with essential stops to get ready for 5 days on the Bayou. Whether making sure we have the right ingredients for our favorite meals, or getting the boats brushed up and ready for action, the day before can be just as important as the day of.

programme.title: E2 - The Past Recalled Once Again
programme.desc: When Tinasha stays with Oscar as his protector, she goes to investigate a magical lake where a demon beast is sealed.

programme.title: E11 - Sorcery And Magic
programme.desc: A demon, Ainswelf, appears and kills many soldiers. He calls Shion a descendant of Legreh and calls his magic 'sorcery'.

programme.title: E12 - Who Am I Really?
programme.desc: Shion realises he has gained an enormous amount of magic power, so he rushes to Marie's side to treat her disease.

programme.title: Mommy Dearest
programme.desc: Two mothers, Emma and Olive, share love for sickly child Mookie. Birth mother Olive cares for her health, while maid Emma becomes her close friend - until Olive intervenes in their growing bond.

programme.title: Day Off
programme.desc: A reality program that gives recognition to the most deserving and most hardworking Filipinos who toil through each day in order to earn a decent living for their families. The hosts take turns substituting for the Day Off winner at work, while he or she enjoys a luxurious day of fun and relaxation with his or her family.

programme.desc: Rachael shows how to make an impressive holiday meal that will make your guests feel like VIPs with her recipe for roasted garlic and rosemary prime rib, which she serves with her mother's special sauce.

programme.title: E3 - Pork Chops With Twice-Cooked Potatoes
programme.desc: Rachael cooks up pork loin chops with sweet onions and apples, serving it with twice-baked potatoes topped with sour cream and chives - all in minutes!

programme.title: E3 - Pork Chops With Twice-Cooked Potatoes
programme.desc: Rachael cooks up pork loin chops with sweet onions and apples, serving it with twice-baked potatoes topped with sour cream and chives - all in minutes!

programme.title: E21 - Beyond The Readings: Feeding The Soul
programme.desc: Downtime is very rare in the life of Theresa Caputo. In this episode, Theresa nurtures her soul by cherishing moments with family and prioritizing self-care, all while graciously channeling spirit.

programme.title: E6 - Pangolins
programme.desc: In the middle of the jungle in Borneo Dr Ann Jones and a team of scientists search high and low for a mammal as big as a dog and covered in scales. One of the world's most trafficked animal; the weird and wonderful pangolin.

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: A tasty sampler of stories from the land - covering food, agriculture, crops, climate, business and innovation - as we meet the fascinating people who make our rural and regional communities unique. Presented by Pip Courtney.

programme.title: E9 - Shut It Down
programme.desc: With just days left to move logs before fire season shuts them down, it's all hands on deck to save a sinking float camp and cash out at both camps.

programme.title: E9 - Shut It Down
programme.desc: With just days left to move logs before fire season shuts them down, it's all hands on deck to save a sinking float camp and cash out at both camps.

programme.title: E5 - The Ships Bell Tolls
programme.desc: 400 miles west of traditional grounds, Wizard captains Keith and Monte come to blows. Captains Rick and Bob face a slack tank, risking their vessel.

programme.title: E2 - Time Bandit Returns
programme.desc: As the fleet faces closure of the fishery, Sig lures legendary captain, Johnathan Hillstrand, out of retirement.

programme.title: E7 - Youre Fired Mate
programme.desc: Sig runs into freezing spray, forcing an emergency set. Keith goes toe to toe with a combative Australian greenhorn. Jake takes a risky strategy.

programme.title: E7 - Youre Fired Mate
programme.desc: Sig runs into freezing spray, forcing an emergency set. Keith goes toe to toe with a combative Australian greenhorn. Jake takes a risky strategy.

programme.title: Fargo (1996)
programme.desc: Minnesota car salesman Jerry Lundegaard's inept crime falls apart due to his and his henchmen's bungling and the persistent police work of the quite pregnant Marge Gunderson.

programme.title: Fargo (1996)
programme.desc: Minnesota car salesman Jerry Lundegaard's inept crime falls apart due to his and his henchmen's bungling and the persistent police work of the quite pregnant Marge Gunderson.

programme.title: Fargo (1996)
programme.desc: Minnesota car salesman Jerry Lundegaard's inept crime falls apart due to his and his henchmen's bungling and the persistent police work of the quite pregnant Marge Gunderson.

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 故事講述了周筱風（趙又廷 飾）、方筱然（毛曉彤 飾）和林逸（金世佳 飾）三位心臟科醫生機緣巧合下，在東立醫院心臟中心相遇。三人因專業背景、職業理念不同而產生摩擦碰撞，隨後在治病救人的過程中逐漸磨合達成默契，最終在生命戰場並肩作戰的故事。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 年輕狀元郎陸江來上任淳寧縣令後屢破奇案，卻因捲入一樁殺妻舊案，從官場新星淪落至絕境。瀕死之際，幸得茶王之女榮善寶搭救。兩人聯手整頓家族、開拓茶道，在茶園裡締結了一段愛情佳話。

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 朱韻剛開始大學生活，就被“壞小子”李峋的闖入徹底顛覆了世界。被朱韻當成不學無術富家子的他，真實身份竟是學校破格錄取的特招生，難得一見的編程天才。兩人在幾次交鋒後，對彼此都有些賞識。學長方志靖對朱韻多次刁難，李峋出手維護朱韻，還邀她加入了自己組建的備賽隊伍，代表學校贏得了重大編程比賽。在相處中，兩人情感日益升溫

programme.title: E48
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.desc: 年輕狀元郎陸江來上任淳寧縣令後屢破奇案，卻因捲入一樁殺妻舊案，從官場新星淪落至絕境。瀕死之際，幸得茶王之女榮善寶搭救。兩人聯手整頓家族、開拓茶道，在茶園裡締結了一段愛情佳話。

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 故事講述了周筱風（趙又廷 飾）、方筱然（毛曉彤 飾）和林逸（金世佳 飾）三位心臟科醫生機緣巧合下，在東立醫院心臟中心相遇。三人因專業背景、職業理念不同而產生摩擦碰撞，隨後在治病救人的過程中逐漸磨合達成默契，最終在生命戰場並肩作戰的故事。

Dot 2 Dot
programme.desc: Chung returns from Canada to a drastically transformed Hong Kong and hoping to capture the city in his childhood years, graffitis a cryptic diagram near every subway station, in the form of dot-to-dot games. Soon they are discovered by Xue, a Putonghua teacher from China determined to solve these riddles as she immerses herself in our city's culture and history...

programme.title: The Medium
programme.desc: A horrifying story of a shaman's inheritance in the Isan region of Thailand. What could be possessing a family member might not be the Goddess they make it out to be. A documentary team follows Nim, a shaman based in Northern Thai, the Isan area, and encounters her niece Mink showing strange symptoms that seem to be of inheritance of shamanism. The team decides to follow Mink, hoping to capture the shaman lineage passing on to the next generation, but her bizarre behavior becomes more extreme.

programme.title: All Shall Be Well
programme.desc: Angie and Pat are a lesbian couple who have been together for over four decades. Pat bought an apartment over thirty years ago where they have lived ever since. The couple is open to their families and often invites Pat's family to their home for dinners. Angie's relationship with them has always been very close. When Pat passes away unexpectedly, Angie is suddenly left on her own to deal with matters related to Pat and her estate. It is not too long before a clash develops over their opinions about the burial arrangements. Angie begins to feel increasingly alienated from Pat's family...

programme.title: Summer Animations: Crayon Shinchan the Movie: The Tornado Legend of Ninja Mononoke
programme.desc: One day, a woman named Chiyome Hesogakure visits the Nohara family with a 5-year-old child called Chinzo. Chiyome claims that she is the actual birth mother of Shinnosuke! But before Misae and Hiroshi figure out the truth, a group of mysterious ninjas come to the Nohara family and take Chiyome and Shinchan away to a Ninja Village! Chiyome tells Shinchan that there is powerful energy stored inside the Earth. To prevent energy loss from the 'Navel of the Earth', descendants of the Hesogakure block it with a pure gold plug by using 'Ninpo: The Art of Mononoke'. The Earth will wither, and the rotation will stop if it comes off! Can Shinchan protect the future of the Earth and the 'tomorrow' of his family?

programme.title: Baogu Produces -Retrieve The Heartbeat
programme.desc: The film “Vital Signs” tells the story of three paramedics who are enthusiastic about their work but at the crossroads facing mounting pressure everyday - while they rescue others' lives, they release themselves through different cases. In this interview, the main cast Louis Koo, Neo Yau and Poon Chan Leung talk about their roles of playing as the paramedic and stories from the film set. Koo reveals that although there wasn't much communication amongst the actors before camera rolling, the chemistry was just great after shout “Action”. Poon also recalls the scene that had left lingering fear in him. Let's follow them to find out more behind-the-scene stories.

programme.title: DAY OFF
programme.desc: For forty years A-Rui has been running a barbershop, a small place where she has seen happiness and sorrow, ebb and flow. Faced with all the troubles in her life, A-Rui fully commits to her work and defeat is never an option for her, but her children never appreciate it and treat her profession with disdain. One day, A-Rui receives a phone call from the family of an old regular client who moved far away a long time ago. The family asks A-Rui if she would be willing to travel to cut the hair for the bedridden old man. Reminded of what her master taught her, “Always provide your best service,” A-Rui decides to hang up the “Day Off” sign and closes her shop for one day. She drives her beat-up old car and embarks on a long journey to do something others think is not worthwhile.

programme.title: Apoy Sa Dugo
programme.desc: A psychological thriller and family-centered drama about sibling rivalry-where love for family can turn into obsession. Bound by blood yet divided by choices, it's a gripping story of secrets, betrayal, and revenge-proving that sometimes, the deepest wounds come from the people you trust most.
